series_metadata.series_title: Findings for Recovery records sent to the Attorney Generals Office
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to persons/entities against whom an unresolved finding for recovery has been issued, including but not limited to related communications, certifications, and findings for recovery work papers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: 7 years from the date the relevant audit report is issued by the Auditor of State, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
